service.name: Perplexity AI API
service.description_for_ai: AI with real-time web search built-in. Answers questions with citations from current web sources. Best for: current events, research with sources, factual questions needing up-to-date info. OpenAI-compatible.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Answer questions with real-time web search and citations. Returns answer + source URLs. Use when user needs current information with verifiable sources.

agent_hints.citations: Response includes citations array with URLs — always show sources to users.
agent_hints.vs_rag: Use Perplexity when you need current web info. Use RAG when you have your own documents.
